title: Astro-Mons
description: A space-themed Cobblemon modpack along with a dedicated server. This pack brings together a colorful adventure with the inclusion of many new biomes and companion cobblemon past the base mod.
body:
Astro-Mons – A Spacefaring Cobblemon Adventure

Astro-Mons is not just another Cobblemon pack — it’s a carefully crafted experience designed to challenge, engage, and reward players who are looking for something deeper than a casual playthrough. Every system, every battle, and every mechanic has been tuned to create a meaningful progression that feels both difficult and satisfying.

What Makes This Pack Unique?

Custom Astro-Mons Trainer API
Every trainer you encounter is powered by Run and Bun sourced AI decision making. These aren’t ordinary opponents — they’re strategically designed, with competitive movesets, and capable of giving even veteran players a serious challenge. Every victory you earn feels deserved, and every defeat pushes you to grow stronger.

True Progression System
The heart of Astro-Mons is progression. You’ll need to carefully build your team and battle your way through increasingly difficult trainer battles. Along the way, you can explore a vast amount of biomes while hunting for legendaries, shinies, and rare Cobblemon that will become the highlight of your adventure.

Space Exploration & Themed Planets
Astro-Mons fully embraces its cosmic theme. Each gym leader is tied to a unique planet that reflects their Pokémon type. As you advance, you’ll travel from world to world, uncovering challenges, resources, and environments that match the leader you’re preparing to face. Every planet feels distinct, adding to the sense of interstellar adventure.

Server-Centered Gameplay
While you can play solo, Astro-Mons is designed from the ground up for our dedicated server. Team up with friends, take on powerful trainers, or test your skill against other players. The server provides the full experience — community, competition, and cooperative exploration — making it the best way to enjoy everything the pack has to offer.

Our Vision

Astro-Mons is under heavy development, and we’re committed to shaping it into a truly unforgettable Cobblemon journey. Our goal is to create an environment where building, battling, and exploring come together seamlessly — where every fight is intense, every reward feels earned, and every step of progression matters.

So gather your team, sharpen your strategy, and prepare to battle among the stars. The galaxy is waiting — and only the strongest trainers will rise to the top.
